name: ExpandingSearch
description: Morphing search button — 40×40 ghost icon idle; opens by animating max-width (40px→100%) on a flex:1 root, so it fills its flex slot. In a justify-content:flex-end row the right edge stays pinned and it expands LEFTWARD into the gap; siblings (flex:0 0 auto) never move or overlay. ESC clears + closes.
